member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.PawnDiedCommand
member.summary: Команда: пешка умерла в клетке (, ). Presentation-слой показывает эффект смерти и обновляет зависящие от пешки UI-плашки.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.PawnDiedCommand.#ctor(DualFrontier.Contracts.Core.EntityId,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Команда: пешка умерла в клетке (, ). Presentation-слой показывает эффект смерти и обновляет зависящие от пешки UI-плашки.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.PawnDiedCommand.PawnId
member.summary: Идентификатор погибшей пешки.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.PawnDiedCommand.X
member.summary: Координата X клетки.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.PawnDiedCommand.Y
member.summary: Координата Y клетки.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand
member.summary: Команда: заспавнился снаряд из точки (,) в точку (,). Presentation создаёт визуал и запускает анимацию полёта.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.#ctor(DualFrontier.Contracts.Core.EntityId,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Команда: заспавнился снаряд из точки (,) в точку (,). Presentation создаёт визуал и запускает анимацию полёта.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.ProjectileId
member.summary: Идентификатор entity снаряда в домене.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.FromX
member.summary: Стартовая координата X.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.FromY
member.summary: Стартовая координата Y.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.ToX
member.summary: Целевая координата X.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.ProjectileSpawnedCommand.ToY
member.summary: Целевая координата Y.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand
member.summary: Команда: маг применил заклинание в точке (,). Presentation показывает VFX в зависимости от школы магии.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand.#ctor(DualFrontier.Contracts.Core.EntityId,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Команда: маг применил заклинание в точке (,). Presentation показывает VFX в зависимости от школы магии.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand.CasterId
member.summary: Идентификатор пешки-мага.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand.SpellId
member.summary: Строковый идентификатор заклинания/школы.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand.X
member.summary: Координата цели X.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.SpellCastCommand.Y
member.summary: Координата цели Y.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.UIUpdateCommand
member.summary: Команда обновления UI-элемента по идентификатору виджета () и строковому сериализованному значению ().

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.UIUpdateCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Команда обновления UI-элемента по идентификатору виджета () и строковому сериализованному значению ().

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.UIUpdateCommand.WidgetId
member.summary: Имя/идентификатор UI-виджета в Presentation.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.Commands.UIUpdateCommand.Payload
member.summary: Новое значение в сериализованном виде.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.IRenderCommand
member.summary: Базовый интерфейс команды рендера, передаваемой из домена в Godot-слой. вызывается строго в главном потоке Godot и получает корневую сцену как object (Application не может иметь ссылку на Godot.Node; приведение выполняет Presentation).

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.IRenderCommand.Execute(System.Object)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 3 — применить команду к сцене Godot. Вызывается только из главного потока.
member.param: Корневая сцена Godot (cast в нужный тип на Presentation).

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.PresentationBridge
member.summary: Мост Domain → Presentation. Домен из любого потока складывает в очередь, главный поток Godot читает их через в своём _Process. Связь строго однонаправленная (TechArch 11.9).

member.name: F:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.PresentationBridge._commands
member.summary: Внутренняя очередь команд рендера. — потокобезопасный контейнер для сценария «много писателей — один читатель».

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.PresentationBridge.Enqueue(DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.IRenderCommand)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 3 — добавляет команду в очередь. Вызывается из любого потока домена.
member.param: Команда рендера, которую нужно применить на главном потоке.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.PresentationBridge.DrainCommands(System.Action{DualFrontier.Application.Bridge.IRenderCommand})
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 3 — извлекает и выполняет все накопленные команды. Вызывается ТОЛЬКО из главного потока Godot (в _Process).
member.param: Делегат, выполняющий команду. Обычно cmd => cmd.Execute(godotScene).

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.FrameClock
member.summary: Часовой таймер. Источник времени для цикла симуляции: возвращает текущий момент, — сколько секунд прошло с прошлого тика. Используется как единственный источник истины о ходе времени; системы видят только передаваемое им delta.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.FrameClock.Now
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — текущий момент. Стартует с нуля, монотонно растёт, не зависит от системных часов (никаких DateTime.Now).

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.FrameClock.DeltaTime
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — сколько прошло секунд с прошлого обновления часов.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.GameLoop
member.summary:
Главный цикл симуляции. Отвечает за старт/стоп мира и тик систем через планировщик ядра. Цикл работает на фиксированном шаге (simulation tick), независимо от FPS рендера.
Domain → Presentation связь строго однонаправленная: цикл складывает команды в PresentationBridge, Godot читает их из главного потока в _Process.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.GameLoop.Start
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — стартует симуляцию. Создаёт рабочий поток(и), инициализирует планировщик и начинает тикать.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.GameLoop.Stop
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — останавливает симуляцию. Ждёт завершения текущего тика, сохраняет состояние при необходимости, освобождает ресурсы.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Loop.GameLoop.Tick(System.Single)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — выполняет один тик симуляции. Вызывает планировщик систем с заданным .
member.param: Прошедшее время в секундах с последнего тика.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ContractValidator
member.summary:
Two-phase validator executed before registration. Phase A checks that every loaded mod is compatible with the current . Phase B inspects every mod system alongside the provided core systems and reports any write-write collision on a component type — producing a precise per-mod diagnostic the scheduler would otherwise surface only as an opaque write conflict detected.
Non-throwing by design: the pipeline decides whether to abort or surface warnings in the UI.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ContractValidator.Validate(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Core.ECS.SystemBase})
member.summary: Runs both validation phases and returns a report. A mod-system that lacks is skipped silently here — registration itself throws a clearer diagnostic at that point.
member.param: Core systems included in the rebuild.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.IModContractStore
member.summary: Runtime registry of inter-mod contracts. One publishing mod owns each contract type; any number of consumers read it back through . When the publishing mod unloads, removes its entries and subsequent lookups gracefully return false — consumers degrade without crashing.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.IModContractStore.Publish``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Publishes a contract for the given mod. Overwrites a previous publication by the same mod; throws when a different mod already owns the contract type.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.IModContractStore.TryGet``1(``0@)
member.summary: Attempts to fetch a previously published contract of type {T}. Returns false and sets to null when no mod has published one yet or the publisher was revoked.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.IModContractStore.RevokeAll(System.String)
member.summary: Removes every contract owned by the given mod. Called from the unload chain before the mod's is collected.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod
member.summary: Result of loading a single mod package — the manifest, the instantiated , the isolated and the discovered list of system types the mod declares. Produced by before the mod is registered with the scheduler.
member.param: Assembly load context owning the mod's assemblies.
All concrete subclasses found in the mod assemblies. Used by to detect write-write conflicts before IMod.Initialize runs.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.#ctor(System.String,DualFrontier.Contracts.Modding.ModManifest,DualFrontier.Contracts.Modding.IMod,DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoadContext,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Type})
member.summary: Result of loading a single mod package — the manifest, the instantiated , the isolated and the discovered list of system types the mod declares. Produced by before the mod is registered with the scheduler.
member.param: Assembly load context owning the mod's assemblies.
All concrete subclasses found in the mod assemblies. Used by to detect write-write conflicts before IMod.Initialize runs.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.ModId
member.summary: Unique identifier taken from .

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.Manifest
member.summary: Parsed manifest metadata.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.Instance
member.summary: IMod instance ready for Initialize.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.Context
member.summary: Assembly load context owning the mod's assemblies.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod.DeclaredSystemTypes
member.summary: All concrete subclasses found in the mod assemblies. Used by to detect write-write conflicts before IMod.Initialize runs.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModContractStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation of backed by a single dictionary keyed by contract type. Not thread-safe: contracts are published and consumed during IMod.Initialize which runs on the menu thread; runtime systems never mutate the store.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult
member.summary: Result of .
member.param: True only when the scheduler was rebuilt with the new mods.
Validation errors collected during the apply; empty on success.
Ids of mods now active after the apply.
Ids (or paths) of mods that failed to load or initialize.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Result of .
member.param: True only when the scheduler was rebuilt with the new mods.
Validation errors collected during the apply; empty on success.
Ids of mods now active after the apply.
Ids (or paths) of mods that failed to load or initialize.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult.Success
member.summary: True only when the scheduler was rebuilt with the new mods.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult.Errors
member.summary: Validation errors collected during the apply; empty on success.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult.LoadedModIds
member.summary: Ids of mods now active after the apply.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.PipelineResult.FailedModIds
member.summary: Ids (or paths) of mods that failed to load or initialize.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIntegrationPipeline
member.summary:
Orchestrator for mod integration. Wires , , and into a single atomic flow.
Executed from the mod menu when the user presses «Apply». The runtime simulation must be stopped before the call — by contract the scheduler is immutable while a session is alive.
Atomicity: runs on a locally created graph. The scheduler's phase list is replaced only after a successful build. Any exception earlier in the chain rolls back mod registration and leaves the scheduler untouched.
Creates a pipeline bound to the given collaborators. The scheduler is the one whose phase list the pipeline rebuilds on success.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIntegrationPipeline.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Applies the given mod paths: loads, validates, registers, rebuilds the dependency graph and replaces the scheduler's phase list. See for atomicity guarantees.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIntegrationPipeline.UnloadAll
member.summary: Unloads every mod currently managed by the pipeline and rebuilds the scheduler with only the core systems. Safe to call even when no mod is active — in that case only the scheduler is rebuilt.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIsolationException
member.summary:
Бросается, когда мод попытался нарушить изоляцию — например, скастить к конкретной реализации или обратиться к внутренностям ядра минуя API.
Также это исключение бросается из SystemExecutionContext, когда мод-система нарушает изоляцию: обращается к незадекларированному компоненту, публикует событие в чужую шину, лезет напрямую к World/ComponentStore или пытается получить ссылку на другую систему через GetSystem.
По правилам TechArch 11.8 такой мод немедленно выгружается ModFaultHandler — ядро при этом не падает, игра продолжает работу.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIsolationException.#ctor
member.summary: Создаёт исключение без сообщения.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIsolationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Создаёт исключение с диагностическим сообщением.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIsolationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Создаёт исключение-обёртку над внутренним.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoadContext
member.summary: Собственный для одного мода. Создаётся с isCollectible: true, чтобы мод можно было выгрузить без перезапуска игры. Физически изолирует сборку мода от ядра (TechArch 11.8).

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoadContext.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 2 — создаёт контекст для мода с заданным именем. Имя используется для диагностики и горячей выгрузки.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoadContext.Load(System.Reflection.AssemblyName)
member.summary: Resolves a mod dependency by delegating to the default context. Returning null lets the parent load shared assemblies such as DualFrontier.Contracts, while the private context still owns the mod's own assemblies loaded via LoadFromAssemblyPath — keeping them isolated and collectible. A follow-up phase can filter the delegated set to harden isolation against accidental loads of DualFrontier.Core and siblings.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader
member.summary: Loads and unloads mods. Each mod lives in its own (via ) — per TechArch 11.8. The context is created with isCollectible: true, which enables hot unload and physically isolates the mod assembly from the core.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.LoadMod(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the mod at the given directory. Reads mod.manifest.json, creates a , loads the entry assembly, resolves the type via reflection and returns the resulting . The mod's Initialize is NOT called here — the pipeline runs it after validation.
member.param: Mod directory containing manifest and assembly.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.UnloadMod(System.String)
member.summary: Unloads the mod with the given id. Chain per MOD_PIPELINE: mod Unload is invoked, the assembly load context is released and the registry entry is dropped. The caller (pipeline) is responsible for cleaning the and contract store before invoking this method so the mod cannot resurrect its state after Unload returns.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.GetLoaded
member.summary: Returns the identifiers of mods currently held by the loader.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.TryGetLoaded(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the entry for the given id or null if the mod is not currently loaded. Used by the pipeline on the unload path.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.RegisterLoaded(DualFrontier.Application.Modding.LoadedMod)
member.summary: Registers an already-built with the loader — used by tests that construct fixtures in-memory without going through the on-disk load path.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModLoader.HandleModFault(System.String,DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModIsolationException)
member.summary: Handles an isolation violation surfaced by the runtime guard. Implemented in the follow-up of Phase 2 — the pipeline hands the exception to ModFaultHandler, which unloads the offending mod without reshaping the graph (graph rebuild is deferred to the next menu open). See and docs/MOD_PIPELINE.md.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry
member.summary:
Registry of all components and systems contributed by mods. Acts as the backing storage for : when a mod calls RegisterComponent or RegisterSystem through the API, the call lands here.
Core systems live in a separate, immutable list set once at start-up via . returns core first and then mod systems in registration order so the dependency graph builds deterministically.
Not thread-safe: the registry is only mutated from the menu thread when the simulation is stopped, never from runtime.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.SetCoreSystems(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Core.ECS.SystemBase})
member.summary: Sets the list of core systems once at start-up. Subsequent calls overwrite the core list but leave mod systems untouched — this supports test setups that rewire core between pipelines.
member.param: Core system instances in their desired order.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.RegisterComponent(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Registers a component type as belonging to the given mod. Throws when the component is already owned by another mod, naming both parties.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.RegisterSystem(System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Registers a system type as belonging to the given mod. The type must carry both and ; otherwise an with a remediation hint is thrown and the mod is considered to have failed initialization.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.GetAllSystems
member.summary: Returns all registered systems: core systems first, then mod systems in registration order. The returned list is a snapshot — mutating the registry after the call does not affect it.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.ResetModSystems
member.summary: Clears mod systems and mod-owned components, preserving core registrations. Called when the pipeline unloads all mods or rolls back a failed apply.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry.RemoveMod(System.String)
member.summary: Removes mod systems and components that belong to the given mod id. Used when a single mod is unloaded while others remain active.
member.param: Identifier of the mod to clear.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.RestrictedModApi
member.summary:
Implementation of that hands to each mod in IMod.Initialize. Proxies calls into the core through and .
A mod MUST NOT cast to this concrete type; detects such attempts and unloads the mod with a .
Subscriptions registered through are tracked per instance so can release them when the mod is unloaded. Publish/Subscribe routing between concrete domain buses is deferred to a later phase — this class currently records subscriptions without touching live buses, which is sufficient for registration and contract flows.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.RestrictedModApi.#ctor(System.String,DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ModRegistry,DualFrontier.Application.Modding.IModContractStore,DualFrontier.Contracts.Bus.IGameServices)
member.summary: Creates an API instance bound to the given mod id, backing registry and contract store. is kept for the later wire-up of / into concrete domain buses.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.RestrictedModApi.UnsubscribeAll
member.summary: Removes every subscription the mod had registered through . Called from the unload chain.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.RestrictedModApi.SubscriptionCount
member.summary: Returns the number of active subscriptions — intended for tests and for the unload chain to assert the cleanup invariant.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.SystemRegistration
member.summary: Entry in : a concrete system instance plus its provenance (core vs mod) and the mod identifier when applicable. Consumed by to feed the dependency graph in the correct order (core-first, then mods by registration).
member.param: System instance to register with the scheduler.
Core or Mod provenance, drives fault routing.
Owning mod id when is ; otherwise null.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.SystemRegistration.#ctor(DualFrontier.Core.ECS.SystemBase,DualFrontier.Core.ECS.SystemOrigin,System.String)
member.summary: Entry in : a concrete system instance plus its provenance (core vs mod) and the mod identifier when applicable. Consumed by to feed the dependency graph in the correct order (core-first, then mods by registration).
member.param: System instance to register with the scheduler.
Core or Mod provenance, drives fault routing.
Owning mod id when is ; otherwise null.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.SystemRegistration.Instance
member.summary: System instance to register with the scheduler.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.SystemRegistration.Origin
member.summary: Core or Mod provenance, drives fault routing.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.SystemRegistration.ModId
member.summary: Owning mod id when is ; otherwise null.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind
member.summary: Kind of validation failure produced by . Determines how the UI presents the error and which remediation it suggests.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind.IncompatibleContractsVersion
member.summary: The mod declares a RequiresContractsVersion that the current build of DualFrontier.Contracts cannot satisfy.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind.WriteWriteConflict
member.summary: Two systems (both from mods, or a mod and core) declare writes to the same component type, which would reject during Build.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind.CyclicDependency
member.summary: The mod graph contains a dependency cycle that cannot be resolved.

member.name: F:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind.MissingDependency
member.summary: The mod requires another mod id that is not present in the load set.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError
member.summary: Single validation failure attributed to a specific mod. Immutable — the validator produces a list of these and the pipeline decides how to react.
member.param: Identifier of the mod the error belongs to.
Human-readable diagnostic for the UI and the log.
Partner mod in a conflict, when applicable.
Component type involved in a write-write conflict, when applicable.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.#ctor(System.String,DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationErrorKind,System.String,System.String,System.Type)
member.summary: Single validation failure attributed to a specific mod. Immutable — the validator produces a list of these and the pipeline decides how to react.
member.param: Identifier of the mod the error belongs to.
Human-readable diagnostic for the UI and the log.
Partner mod in a conflict, when applicable.
Component type involved in a write-write conflict, when applicable.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.ModId
member.summary: Identifier of the mod the error belongs to.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.Kind
member.summary: Category of the failure.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.Message
member.summary: Human-readable diagnostic for the UI and the log.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.ConflictingModId
member.summary: Partner mod in a conflict, when applicable.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError.ConflictingComponent
member.summary: Component type involved in a write-write conflict, when applicable.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationWarning
member.summary: Non-blocking advisory attributed to a specific mod. Warnings do not prevent loading — the UI shows them alongside a successful apply.
member.param: Identifier of the mod the warning belongs to.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationWarning.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Non-blocking advisory attributed to a specific mod. Warnings do not prevent loading — the UI shows them alongside a successful apply.
member.param: Identifier of the mod the warning belongs to.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationWarning.ModId
member.summary: Identifier of the mod the warning belongs to.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationWarning.Message
member.summary: Human-readable advisory text.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport
member.summary: Aggregate result of . Immutable. is derived from the emptiness of .
member.param: True when no blocking errors were reported.
Errors that prevent the pipeline from proceeding.
Advisories that do not prevent loading.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationError},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationWarning})
member.summary: Aggregate result of . Immutable. is derived from the emptiness of .
member.param: True when no blocking errors were reported.
Errors that prevent the pipeline from proceeding.
Advisories that do not prevent loading.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport.IsValid
member.summary: True when no blocking errors were reported.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport.Errors
member.summary: Errors that prevent the pipeline from proceeding.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport.Warnings
member.summary: Advisories that do not prevent loading.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Modding.ValidationReport.Ok
member.summary: Factory for the success case: no errors, no warnings, valid.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Save.ISaveSystem
member.summary: Контракт системы сохранения/загрузки мира. Оба метода синхронные — асинхронность (прогресс, отмена) обязан обеспечить вышестоящий слой.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Save.ISaveSystem.Save(System.String)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — сохраняет текущее состояние мира в файл по указанному пути.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Save.ISaveSystem.Load(System.String)
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — загружает состояние мира из файла. Текущее состояние мира перезаписывается.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Save.SaveFormat
member.summary: Версия и заголовок формата сохранения. При несовместимом значении сохранение считается старым и должно проходить миграцию (TODO: Фаза 3).

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Save.SaveFormat.Version
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — текущая версия формата. Увеличивается при любом несовместимом изменении сериализации.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Save.SaveFormat.Header
member.summary: TODO: Фаза 1 — магический заголовок файла (например, "DFSAVE\0"), чтобы быстро отличить сохранение от произвольного бинарника.

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Save.SaveSystem
member.summary: Реализация . Сериализует World и все его компонентные хранилища в бинарный формат с версионным заголовком ().

member.name: T:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef
member.summary: Immutable definition of a starting scenario. Parsed from JSON by ScenarioLoader.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.Id
member.summary: Unique scenario identifier, e.g. "default".

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.Name
member.summary: Display name shown in scenario selection UI.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.StartingPawnCount
member.summary: Starting pawn count.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.WorldSeed
member.summary: World seed for terrain generation. 0 = random.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.MapWidth
member.summary: Map width in tiles.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.MapHeight
member.summary: Map height in tiles.

member.name: P:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioDef.StartingItems
member.summary: Starting item definitions by item id and quantity.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioLoader.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a scenario definition from a JSON file at the given path. Throws FileNotFoundException if file does not exist. Throws InvalidOperationException if JSON is invalid or missing required fields.

member.name: M:DualFrontier.Application.Scenario.ScenarioLoader.LoadDefault
member.summary: Returns the built-in default scenario without reading any file. Used when no scenario file is available (first launch, tests).
